title: helichrysum sessile
intro: Helichrysum sessile, also known as the yellow everlasting or bush everlasting, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of helichrysum sessile include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and promoting relaxation, which can be attributed to its high levels of compounds such as sesquiterpene and flavonoids. Helichrysum sessile is often prepared as an essential oil, tincture, or tea, and can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
